note: Core JWT sign and verify functions — entire file exists because of the Jan 14 JWT decision
Token extraction and verification middleware — stateless check, no DB call, direct result of JWT choice
Client-side token storage helper — only exists because tokens live on the client (JWT, not sessions)
Spec section describing the JWT auth flow, drafted after the Jan 14 decision
PostgreSQL connection pool — library choice (asyncpg) and connection config driven by Postgres decision
SQLAlchemy model with relational FK to users — structure only makes sense in a relational DB
3-step checkout component — the step count (3) is hardcoded and traces to the Feb 28 decision
Step 1 of 3
Step 2 of 3 — delivery and payment are combined because of the 3-step decision
Step 3 of 3
user_id FK only — no name/email/address fields. PII is explicitly absent due to the Mar 15 decision
All PII lives here, not in order model — architecture enforced by the compliance decision
Vercel deployment config — file only exists because of the Apr 2 deployment decision
Exponential backoff + jitter implementation — entire module created after the Apr 20 decision
Router mounted at /v1/ prefix — the URL path versioning strategy from the May 8 decision
Spec section on versioning strategy, explicitly rejecting header versioning
Rate limiter — the 100 req/min constant comes directly from the May 22 decision
Redis-backed rate limit counter — scoped use of Redis as decided Jun 10
Cart session cache in Redis — ephemeral only, no durable data
Monorepo root package.json with workspaces — the entire repo structure traces to the Jun 28 decision
